---
name: Content Update / 内容纠错与资料补充
about: Suggest corrections or additions for encyclopedia data, attribute guides, or copywriting / 提交图鉴、属性介绍或文案内容的修正建议
title: "[Content] "
labels: content
assignees: ""
---

## Affected Content / 涉及内容

Please specify the related page, creature, attribute, or copy section.
请写明相关页面、精灵、属性或文案位置。

## Current Issue / 当前问题

Explain what is incorrect, missing, or unclear in the current content.
请说明当前内容有什么错误、缺失或不清晰的地方。

## Suggested Change / 建议修改

If possible, provide the replacement text directly for easier processing.
请尽量直接写出建议替换后的内容，方便处理。

## Reference / 参考依据

If available, include links to official sources, screenshots, videos, or other references.
如有官方资料、截图、视频或其他参考，请附上链接。

## Additional Notes / 其他补充

Add any extra notes here if needed.
如有其他说明，请补充在这里。
